title: Prototype to Production
summary: Learn how to safely move your agent from a local test to a real-world system.

concepts.name: What is Deployment?
concepts.explanation: Deployment means making your agent available to real users, not just yourself. It involves putting your code on a server so others can access it through the internet.

concepts.name: Safety Before Deployment
concepts.explanation: Before deploying, always check: Are secrets stored safely? Did you test all edge cases? Is there a human review step for risky actions? What happens if the agent gets a confusing input?

concepts.name: Human-in-the-Loop
concepts.explanation: Human-in-the-loop means a real person approves important agent actions before they happen. For example, before an agent sends an email or deletes a file, it should ask for human approval.

concepts.name: Agent2Agent (A2A)
concepts.explanation: A2A means two or more agents communicating with each other to complete a task. For example, a Manager Agent assigns a task to a Research Agent and a Writing Agent. They work together and report back.

concepts.name: Cloud Billing Warning
concepts.explanation: When you deploy to cloud services, costs can add up quickly. Always check pricing before enabling cloud APIs. Start with free tiers and set spending limits.

quiz_questions.question: What does human-in-the-loop mean?
options: A) A human writes all the code
B) A real person approves important agent actions before they run
C) The agent replaces all human workers
D) Humans train the model daily
quiz_questions.explanation: Human-in-the-loop keeps humans in control of risky or important agent actions.

quiz_questions.question: What should you always check before deploying an agent to the cloud?
options: B) Whether secrets are stored safely and billing limits are set
C) How fast your home internet is
D) The number of lines of code
quiz_questions.explanation: Secret management and billing control are critical safety steps before deployment.

quiz_questions.question: What is Agent2Agent (A2A)?
options: B) Two agents communicating to complete a task together
C) A way to delete agents
quiz_questions.explanation: A2A enables multi-agent workflows where specialized agents collaborate on complex tasks.
